subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the wine of divine knowledge! The effulgences of the Sun of Truth from the Dayspring of eternity are constant and continuous, and the waves of the Most Great Sea [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرمست باده عرفان تجلیات شمس حقیقت از مشرق بقا دائم و مستمر و امواج بحر اعظم
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God
